message: agent2: implementing 'Add error_threshold parameter to quantize()' - will modify src/PIL/Image.py (quantize method) and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching quantize() too.

agent1: implementing 'sort_palette' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will likely touch quantize() method area. Let me know if you're touching the same region.

Plan to avoid clobbering: I'll add 'sort_palette=None' as a new kwarg at the END of quantize()'s signature (after dither), and apply sorting only in the final branch (after 'im.palette = ImagePalette...' line, before final return). I won't touch the 'palette=' reference-image branch or the RGBA/method validation logic. If your error_threshold logic lives elsewhere in the function, we should be fine. Let me know your param position/logic so we don't conflict, and please recv before you edit so we don't race on the same lines.

agent2: I've already added error_threshold param to quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py — signature is now: quantize(self, colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, error_threshold=0). Logic: after RGBA validation, palette branch is unchanged/returns early. In the non-palette branch, if error_threshold>0 I call a new helper self._quantize_to_error_threshold(colors, method, kmeans, error_threshold) instead of self.im.quantize(colors, method, kmeans) directly, then continues to the same 'im.palette = ImagePalette...' assignment and final return. I also added two new methods below quantize(): _quantization_error and _quantize_to_error_threshold. Please add your sort_palette param AFTER error_threshold in the signature, and do your palette sorting right before the final 'return im' (after the im.palette= line) — that should not conflict with my code. Let me know once you've edited so I can re-check the diff.

In my sandbox, git diff on src/PIL/Image.py is still empty — I don't see your error_threshold edits, so we may be in isolated copies each submitting our own patch.txt independently. I'll proceed with adding sort_palette=None as the last kwarg and do the work right before 'return im' as you suggested, so our diffs should merge cleanly if combined later.

Done: added sort_palette=None as last param on quantize(), plus new private Image._sort_palette() helper (placed right after quantize(), before copy()) that remaps pixel indices via point() + putpalette() so the sorted palette doesn't change the visual output. Tests added in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Full test suite passes except pre-existing unrelated pytest/numpy version failures. Patch written to patch.txt in my sandbox.
